title: SQL: schema change makes server prone for kill (meltdown)
bug_features_seed: CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table (id Int32, name String, created_at DateTime DEFAULT now());
CREATE TABLE test_schema.test_table2 (ref_id Int32, description String NOT NULL);
INSERT INTO test_schema.test_table2 (ref_id, description) VALUES (1, CAST(NULL AS String));
key_bug_features: schema change causes server vulnerability to kill
